offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 expense reports/month, discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile credit card statements with expense reports instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: discrepancies between credit card statements and employee expense reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows

try_it: Let users try manual entry for expense reports and flagging
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
